    E

    Enemies - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Team
     
    Enemy - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Enemy class defines the common behavior and properties of all enemy entities.
    Enemy(double, double, double, double, String, double, double, double, double, EntityBehaviour, Weapon) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
    Constructs a new Enemy with the provided attributes.
    enemyHit - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.MeleeHitBox
     
    enemyType - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
     
    EnemyType - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The EnemyType enum defines the types of enemies available in the game.
    entities - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    entitiesViewersList - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Entity - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Entity class represents a basic game object with position, dimensions, health, and collision handling.
    Entity(double, double, double, double, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    Constructs a new Entity with the specified position, dimensions, and texture.
    Entity(double, double, double, double, String, double, double, Team) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    Constructs a new Entity with additional parameters such as health, speed, and team.
    ENTITY - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Collision.CollisionType
     
    Entity.Direction - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The possible directions for an entity.
    Entity.State - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    Represents the state of an entity.
    EntityBehaviour - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    EntityBehaviour is used to determine the behaviour of the entity
    entityIdCounter - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    entityManager - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    EntityManager - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    The EntityManager class is responsible for discovering and registering entity classes and creating entity instances for game use.
    EntityManager() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.EntityManager
    Constructs an EntityManager instance.
    entityState - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
     
    EntityStates - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    What the entity is doing right now
